goal: Close all outstanding branches from v3, complete the low-friction wave with a final verdict, then conditionally explore weak-window repair and medium-friction branches under strict gate discipline.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable — never modify the base snapshot.
Rejected branches must not be reopened: H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1_high_iv_long_v1, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon.
Static high-IV regime is a volatility regime descriptor, not a directional signal.
Every branch must reach a terminal decision (promoted / rejected / formally-skipped) before any downstream gate unlocks.
Do not confuse a data task with a research result — feature materialization ≠ hypothesis validation.
Medium-friction wave is locked until every low-friction branch is closed and weak-window repair is completed.

stages.title: Полный closure-audit по прошлым планам
stages.objective: Create a unified open-items register of all unresolved work from prior plan versions before starting new research.
actions: Open a new research_project for v4.
Record a closure-audit capturing every unfinished branch from v3.
Record the immutable reference (active-signal-v1@1) in project memory.
Define research_map axes for the v4 program.
Compile a single open-items register listing every dangling branch.
success_criteria: A single open-items register exists and is recorded in project memory.
The immutable reference snapshot is formally recorded.

stages.title: Формально закрыть все незавершенные документы и memory-nodes прошлых планов
stages.objective: Eliminate organizational debt by attaching terminal status to every dangling branch from v3.
actions: Create a terminal result node for A1_high_iv_long_v1 with rejected status.
Verify rejected status for H1_post_funding_long, H2_expiry_lead_lag, A1b_high_iv_momentum, A4_wed_afternoon.
Record a v3_final_report research_record summarizing outcomes.
Update all registry statuses so no branch lacks a terminal node.
success_criteria: No branch in research memory lacks a terminal node (promoted / rejected / skipped).

stages.title: Полностью закрыть ветку A2_iv_acceleration
stages.objective: Drive the main unfinished branch from v3 (A2 IV acceleration) to a definitive terminal decision through a full acceptance chain.
actions: Author feature contract for cf_iv_delta_1h (IV acceleration feature).
Materialize the feature via features_custom or features_dataset.
Run plausibility check on base-absent surface (no overlap with existing base features).
Build strict prototype snapshots (a2_v2_standalone, a2_v3_standalone).
Run standalone backtests, then integration backtests against the immutable base.
Run stability analysis on both prototypes.
Record terminal decision: promoted or rejected with documented reason.
success_criteria: A2_iv_acceleration has a terminal decision (promoted or rejected).
Standalone and integration results are recorded.

stages.title: Только если A2 не promoted — полностью закрыть A3_broader_cl_transition
stages.objective: If A2 was rejected, close the backup branch A3 (broader candlestick transition) with a full acceptance chain so it does not remain half-alive.
actions: Author transition feature contracts grouped by semantic meaning.
Materialize transition features.
Run plausibility check on base-absent surface.
Build strict prototype snapshots for A3.
Run full acceptance chain: standalone backtest, integration, stability.
Record terminal decision for A3.
success_criteria: A3_broader_cl_transition has a terminal decision (promoted or rejected or formally-skipped).
stages.gate_hint: UNLOCK only if A2_iv_acceleration was NOT promoted in stage_3.

stages.title: Общий вердикт по low-friction wave
stages.objective: Produce a single definitive verdict on whether the low-friction exploration space has been exhausted.
actions: Compare all candidates (A2, A3 if run) against the immutable base.
Classify each candidate as mainline-quality / specialist-watchlist / rejected.
Accept exactly one of three final outcomes: (1) promoted candidate found, (2) no promotion but repair viable, (3) space exhausted.
Record the final verdict in research memory.
success_criteria: A single final verdict on low-friction wave is recorded and signed off.

stages.title: Новая программа v4 — weak-window repair specialists
stages.objective: Attempt targeted repair of the weakest performance pockets in the immutable base using narrowly scoped specialist hypotheses.
actions: Build a weakness atlas for the immutable base using feature analytics and backtest diagnostics.
Identify at most 2 weak pockets (worst-performing time windows or condition clusters).
For each weak pocket, formulate one specialist hypothesis targeting repair.
For each specialist, execute a shortened but honest acceptance chain: feature contract, materialization, standalone backtest, integration test, stability.
Record verdict for each specialist: useful-repair / inconclusive / rejected.
success_criteria: Answer documented: can targeted repair produce meaningful improvement over the base or not.

stages.title: Только после этого — решение по medium-friction wave
stages.objective: Decide whether to unlock medium-friction branches (B1 cross-symbol leadership, B2 model-backed IV routing) — only after all prior work is conclusively finished.
actions: Verify all unlock conditions: A2 terminal, A3 terminal or skipped, low-friction verdict recorded, weak-window repair completed, no promoted candidate exists.
If unlocked: explore B1 (cross-symbol leadership) and/or B2 (model-backed IV routing / compression) through scoped experiments.
If locked: record the lock decision with rationale and recommended next steps.
success_criteria: A clear lock or unlock decision is recorded for the medium-friction wave.
stages.gate_hint: UNLOCK only if ALL of: (1) A2 has terminal decision, (2) A3 closed or formally skipped, (3) low-friction final verdict recorded, (4) weak-window repair program completed, (5) no promoted candidate from low-friction or repair waves.

stages.title: Финальный отчет по v4
stages.objective: Produce a comprehensive final report summarizing all v4 research outcomes, decisions, and recommendations for the next cycle.
actions: Compile all terminal decisions, verdicts, and rejected branches into a single closing document.
Record v4_final_report as a research_record.
Update the research_map with final atlas state.
Send notification of plan completion.
success_criteria: v4_final_report is recorded with all branch verdicts, the low-friction verdict, repair verdict, and medium-friction decision.
No open branches remain without terminal status.

warnings: Parse confidence 0.90 — actions for stages 3 and 4 had sparse action hints; sub-steps were inferred from section titles.
Stage 8 had no explicit objective, actions, or success criteria in the source — inferred from plan context.
